items.title: Claude AI finds Vim, Emacs RCE bugs that trigger on file open
items.summary: Vulnerabilities in the Vim and GNU Emacs text editors, discovered using simple prompts with the Claude assistant, allow remote code execution simply by opening a file. [...]

items.title: Cisco source code stolen in Trivy-linked dev environment breach
items.summary: Cisco has suffered a cyberattack after threat actors used stolen credentials from the recent Trivy supply chain attack to breach its internal development environment and steal source code belonging to the company and its customers. [...]

items.title: How to Categorize AI Agents and Prioritize Risk
items.summary: AI agent risk isn't equal, it scales with access to systems and level of autonomy. Token Security explains how CISOs should categorize agents and prioritize what to secure first. [...]

items.title: Hackers compromise Axios npm package to drop cross-platform malware
items.summary: Hackers hijacked the npm account of the Axios package, a JavaScript HTTP client with 100M+ weekly downloads, to deliver remote access trojans to Linux, Windows, and macOS systems. [...]

items.title: Microsoft fixes Outlook Classic crashes caused by Teams Meeting add-in
items.summary: ​Microsoft has resolved a known issue that rendered the classic Outlook email client unusable for users who enabled the Microsoft Teams Meeting Add-in. [...]
